Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff H.P.S.C., Inc., a corporation.
No appearance by defendants MCT Associates, Inc., a corporation, dba Bright Minds Institute, Fernando G. Miranda, as an individual, or Richard A. Levy, as an individual.
Defaults were entered agasint defendants on October 15, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, January 28, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed January 11, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff H.P.S.C., Inc., a corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendants MCT Associates, Inc., a corporation, dba Bright Minds Institute, Fernando G. Miranda, as an individual, and Richard A. Levy, as an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $124,145.49.
Interest - $22,101.30.
Attorney Fees - Reserved.
Costs - $505.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $146,751.79.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
